meta_title: For Founders: testing automation to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Testing Automation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use testing automation to overcome a lack of portfolio. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build high-value test automation suites for open-source projects or your own MVP. By demonstrating robust, automated testing, you prove technical maturity and reliability to clients. Use Antigravity to scaffold tests and Claude Code to execute them, turning 'no experience' into 'proven automation expertise'.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a new founder is daunting, but the empty portfolio is fatal. Potential clients don't care about your degree; they care about the stability and reliability of the code you ship. When you have no track record, your testing suite becomes your silent salesperson.

By implementing automated testing, you shift the narrative from 'I am a beginner' to 'I am a professional who values quality'. This isn't just about catching bugs—it's about building a scalable architecture that gives stakeholders the confidence to invest in your vision from day one.

steps.title: Define Test Coverage Strategy
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the critical user paths that must never break. Focus on the 'Happy Path' for your core business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive test plan for a SaaS authentication flow, covering sign-up, login, and password reset scenarios. Generate a list of edge cases to test.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze my current project structure and propose a prioritized list of 5 integration tests.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Testing Infrastructure
steps.description: Establish a robust testing environment using modern frameworks. This ensures your project looks professional from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Playwright testing environment for a TypeScript project, including configuration for headless browser testing and local development server integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Install Playwright and initialize the test folder structure with a sample smoke test.'

steps.title: Automate the Happy Path
steps.description: Write your first set of end-to-end tests. This proves your application works as intended and provides a foundation for your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test script that navigates to the login page, enters credentials, and verifies the user is redirected to the dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute the new authentication test and fix any selector mismatches.'

steps.title: Implement Continuous Integration
steps.description: Automate the execution of your tests on every push. This is a hallmark of professional SaaS engineering.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow file that triggers the test suite on every pull request to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a .github/workflows/test.yml file that runs npm test on push.'

steps.title: Document Your Process
steps.description: A portfolio isn't just code; it's the story of how you solve problems. Document your testing strategy in your README.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a README section titled 'Quality Assurance' that explains the testing strategy, tools used, and how to run the suite locally.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Update the project README with a technical overview of the testing infrastructure I just built.'

pro_tips: Treat your test code with the same rigor as production code; poor tests are worse than no tests.
Always run your test suite before presenting your project to a stakeholder to ensure zero regressions.
Use test-driven development (TDD) for new features to keep your velocity high and your bug count low.
Showcase your test coverage percentage in your GitHub repository to visually signal high quality to potential clients.
Automate your documentation updates using Claude Code to ensure your README always reflects the current state of your tests.
content.next_steps: Once your tests are passing, push your project to GitHub and pin it to your profile. Use the automated testing suite as a key talking point in your sales outreach to demonstrate professional-grade reliability.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in silence and start shipping code that proves your worth. Our community gives you the blueprints, the tools, and the network to move from zero to your first paying customer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
